publishedAbstract: - Metrics are not seen in Grafana- The `node-exporter` pods seem to be working fine but targets are seen `down` from Prometheus pods- Query of metrics targets from Prometheus pods produces the error `WAL log samples: log series: write /prometheus/wal/xxyyzz: transport endpoint is not connected` where `xxyyzz` is the wal number.
publishedTitle: Prometheus pods unable to see targets in OCP 3
